MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Barbara Cray of the law offices of Barbara Cray (650-654-2729) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Due To Default Of Defendant Pursuant To Stipulation For Entry Of Judgment is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.
